sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing. He denies chest pain, dyspnea, or syncope. The patient reports a history of diabetes.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 90/60 mmHg. Heart rate is 88 bpm. Neurologic exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has diabetes and presents with symptoms suggestive of orthostatic hypotension.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order an EKG to evaluate for arrhythmias. Recommend increasing oral fluid intake to 2 liters daily. Schedule follow-up in one week to assess response to treatment.
